name: precision: a question asked back to the user is not a work-claim
note: VERBATIM from a real captured turn. The agent ended its reply with a question offering next steps. It contains code-span targets (`src/`, the reconciler) and so parses as a claim with zero evidence -> phantom. A question is never an assertion of completed work.
claim: Want me to dig into the actual implementation (`src/`, the reconciler, the hooks), review it, or something else?
